eras.name: The Creator Era
eras.description: This era belongs to the makers — the ones who turn blank canvases into worlds. You don't just work; you express. And the tools you work with should be as intentional as your art.
eras.motif: Studio light, late nights, the smell of something being made
eras.successDefinition: Work that makes people feel something
eras.dellNarrative: Dell tools that render your vision faithfully — from first concept to final export.

eras.name: The Innovator Era
eras.tagline: You build what others only imagine.
eras.description: You see systems where others see problems, and you build solutions before anyone else knows they need them. This era belongs to the engineers of possibility.
eras.motif: Terminal windows open at midnight, the satisfaction of a passing test
eras.successDefinition: Shipping something that works, that scales, that matters
eras.dellNarrative: Developer-ready performance for the problems worth solving.

eras.name: The Achiever Era
eras.tagline: Greatness is the only setting you know.
eras.description: You move people, results, and organizations forward. You don't just sit at the table — you set the agenda. This era belongs to the ones who make things happen at scale.
eras.motif: Boardrooms, momentum, the satisfaction of a quarter that exceeds
eras.successDefinition: Building a team that can win without you in the room
eras.dellNarrative: Business-grade reliability for the decisions that cost more than a laptop.

eras.name: The Explorer Era
eras.tagline: The whole world is your workspace.
eras.description: Your best ideas arrive somewhere between time zones. You've rejected the idea that work is a place — and now you're designing a life that proves it. This era belongs to the untethered.
eras.motif: Ocean views, coffee shops at sunrise, video calls that could be anywhere
eras.successDefinition: Full freedom to work from anywhere, without sacrificing quality
eras.dellNarrative: Ultraportable, always connected, built for the road.

eras.name: The Visionary Era
eras.tagline: You see the future before it arrives.
eras.description: You're not here to optimize the existing world — you're here to replace parts of it. This era belongs to founders, reformers, and the obsessively long-term.
eras.motif: Whiteboards, investor calls, the quiet before the launch
eras.dellNarrative: The performance setup for ideas that don't fit in a box.

eras.name: The Performer Era
eras.tagline: When you play, the world watches.
eras.description: This isn't a hobby. This is a craft, a career, and a community. You perform at a level most people never reach — and your setup needs to match that standard.
eras.motif: RGB glow, live chat scrolling, the clutch play that made the clip
eras.successDefinition: Winning — and having an audience watching when you do
eras.dellNarrative: Alienware-grade performance for the moments that count.
